subjects.description: A small child wearing a bright red hooded jacket and dark trousers, stepping off the curb to cross the industrial-edge street directly in the vehicle's path
subjects.appearance_details: Carries a small backpack, wears scuffed sneakers; the red jacket vivid against the grey concrete and bare trees
subjects.relationship: The pedestrian hazard that prompts the ego vehicle to brake; the central reason for the deceleration event
subjects.location: Center foreground, crossing from right sidewalk into the road
subjects.orientation: Profile view, facing left as the child walks across the road
subjects.pose: Mid-stride, one leg forward, arms slightly swinging while walking
subjects.action: Steps off the sidewalk and begins crossing the road
subjects.state_changes: Moves from curb into roadway, continuing across the vehicle's path and pausing briefly mid-road
subjects.clothing: Bright red hooded jacket, dark trousers, scuffed sneakers, small backpack
subjects.expression: Unaware and casual, looking ahead across the street
subjects.facial_features: Round face, dark short hair, small features

subjects.description: Parked older cars and work vans lining the curbs of the industrial-edge residential street
subjects.appearance_details: A mix of weathered sedans and utility vans in drab and faded colors, dull under the overcast light beside chain-link fencing
subjects.relationship: Part of the residential environment; potential occlusion that hides the child until they step out
subjects.location: Left and right midground along the curbs
subjects.orientation: Parallel-parked, facing toward and away from camera along the road edges

background_setting: A plain residential street on the edge of a North American industrial district under a flat, overcast late-autumn noon. Modest brick and clapboard houses stand between low warehouse walls and chain-link fences along a two-lane road paved in worn, patched concrete. Bare-limbed trees and a few parked work vans and older cars line the curbs; cracked sidewalks run beside the homes. Light haze mutes the distance and the diffuse grey sky casts no distinct shadows on the pale concrete and its faded center markings.

lighting.conditions: Flat overcast late-autumn daylight with light haze
lighting.direction: Even, diffuse light from the whole grey sky, no direct sun
lighting.shadows: Essentially shadowless; soft, indistinct grounding shadows only
lighting.illumination_effect: Muted, low-contrast grey illumination that flattens depth; the child's red jacket stands out sharply against the drab concrete and bare trees

aesthetics.composition: Centered forward-facing ego perspective with the road vanishing toward the horizon, child positioned in the central lane, parked cars framing the sides
aesthetics.color_scheme: Muted greys of concrete and overcast sky, drab brick and rust tones, bare brown branches, and a striking red accent from the child's jacket
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Bleak, still industrial-edge calm sharply broken by sudden caution
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating parked vans and cars, chain-link fencing, bare tree trunks, warehouse walls

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward-moving ego dashcam motion that decelerates and comes to a complete stop
cinematography.framing: Wide shot from the driver's viewpoint
cinematography.focus: Sharp on the road and crossing child; hazy distance softly muted

context: Autonomous driving or ADAS demonstration of pedestrian detection and emergency braking in a residential setting

actions.description: The ego vehicle travels forward at a moderate speed down the overcast industrial-edge residential street.
A small child in a red jacket steps off the right sidewalk and begins crossing into the vehicle's path.
The ego vehicle promptly applies firm, controlled braking on the worn concrete, decelerating as the nose dips slightly.
The vehicle reaches a complete stop well before the child and remains fully stopped while the child continues across.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: White painted text on the worn concrete, partially faded and scuffed, flat under the grey overcast light
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the road surface ahead, visible in the center of frame throughout
text_and_signage_elements.context: Traffic calming marking indicating a low-speed residential zone

segments.description: Ego vehicle cruises forward through the drab industrial-edge residential street with parked vans and bare trees under flat grey light.
segments.key_changes: Steady forward motion at moderate speed
segments.camera: Forward dashcam motion, smooth and steady

segments.description: A child steps off the sidewalk into the road; the vehicle begins firm, controlled braking and decelerates rapidly.
segments.key_changes: Hazard appears; speed drops sharply, nose dips under braking
segments.camera: Forward motion slowing, slight forward pitch from deceleration

segments.description: The vehicle comes to a complete stop well before the child and holds stationary as the child crosses safely on the concrete road.
segments.key_changes: Vehicle fully stopped and held stationary

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam moves forward down a drab industrial-edge residential street under flat overcast light, bare trees and parked vans lining the worn concrete road. By 0:01 a small child in a bright red jacket steps off the right sidewalk and begins crossing directly ahead. From 0:01 to 0:03 the ego vehicle applies firm, controlled braking, slowing with a slight forward pitch in the flat grey light. By 0:03 the vehicle has stopped completely well before the child, and from 0:03 to 0:05 it holds stationary while the child crosses safely.
audio_description: Dull industrial-edge ambience of a distant machinery hum and faint traffic, the steady hum of the vehicle over worn concrete, then firm tire and brake friction as it decelerates, settling into a low idle with muffled background noise.
